question: Has anything like tokenized real-world assets or on-chain funds been funded through the SCF?

golden.answer:
Use `lumenloop.find_similar_scf_submissions`, `lumenloop.get_project`, `lumenloop.get_scf_submissions`, `lumenloop.search_directory` to retrieve current, source-bounded results for this question. Report the source and as-of date. Treat returned rosters, ranks, counts, and current values as observations, not timeless facts.

Stable guardrails that remain in force: Uses official submission status and URL to identify representative Awarded RWA/tokenization work. Separates official status from award_type, directory status, semantic similarity, and reconstructed totals.
keyFacts: Retrieves source-bounded live results via lumenloop.find_similar_scf_submissions, lumenloop.get_project, lumenloop.get_scf_submissions, lumenloop.search_directory and reports their source and as-of date without freezing a roster, rank, count, or current value.
Uses official submission status and URL to identify representative Awarded RWA/tokenization work.
Separates official status from award_type, directory status, semantic similarity, and reconstructed totals.
avoid: Do NOT treat award_type=Build, a proposed amount, or a semantic match as proof the submission is Awarded.
Do NOT call OrbitCDP or another historical award recipient currently live solely from SCF history.
Do NOT assert BENJI, CRDT, or USDY never had any SCF relationship without a matching exhaustive official record.
Do NOT state a specific current TVL, count, roster, rank, or value as a timeless fact.
golden.notes:
GROUNDED 2026-07-10: semantic/directory results are discovery only. Grade explicit official submission status and URL, distinguish Awarded from Test Transaction/Ready for Payment/Information Collection, and do not infer current project status from an award.
Also good if the answer says issuer primaries describe BENJI/CRDT/USDY as issuer-led and no exact official funded-page match was found asOf, without turning that into a timeless no-SCF claim.
Golden cites: SCF archive matches (or an explicit 'none found' note).
GT-17 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: current official status wins over semantic award fields; all amounts/statuses are dated and submission-specific.

corroboration.claim: SCF has officially Awarded RWA/tokenization submissions, while award_type alone does not establish Awarded status.

evidence.ref: A: official communityfund.stellar.org submission pages for eight Awarded examples and three non-Awarded workflow counterexamples

corroboration.claim: BENJI/FOBXX, CRDT, and USDY definitively never had any SCF relationship.

evidence.ref: A: no exact match appeared on the official funded-projects page asOf 2026-07-10; issuer primaries describe issuer-led launches
